commit_scope: Add a repeatable local Hati-OS physical lane probe that emits native binaries from Form, compiles them with clang, and runs real host/resource lanes through those binaries.

local_validation.notes: The physical lane probe passed and wrote .cache/hati-os-physical-lanes/20260613T035657Z/summary.json with 12 lane records. Native binaries fkdump/fkserver are Mach-O arm64 executables. Real artifacts include mic_sample.wav (PCM WAV, 16-bit mono 16000 Hz), speaker_push.aiff (AIFF-C, generated and played by afplay), screen_read.png (3456 x 2234 PNG), camera_frame.jpg (640 x 480 JPEG), lane.sqlite, applets.txt, and sample.xml. Sensor inventory records AVFoundation camera/mic/screen devices and the physical absence of a GPS provider on this Mac host.

ci_validation.notes: CI is not expected to have mic/speaker/screen/camera access; this probe is a local physical host proof.

phase_gate.gate: Local Hati-emitted native binaries touch and record host exec, HTTP, kernel route, store query, shell applets, model Q/A, audio, screen, camera, and sensor inventory lanes.
phase_gate.next: Promote successful lane recipes behind the native tool/channel executor so cells and recipes can request them without shell orchestration.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A repeatable script demonstrates the native fourth-kernel physical lane chain on the local host.
test_flows: Form emits C for Hati driver/server binaries.
Native binaries execute local resource lane commands and capture stdout/artifacts.
summary.json records every lane result with command, native binary, output file, artifact path, and captured bytes.
e2e_validation.summary: Local Hati physical lane proof passed with 12 lane records in .cache/hati-os-physical-lanes/20260613T035657Z/summary.json.
